title: Unisys India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Unisys India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Unisys India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Unisys India:
Unisys India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India!
